narrative: Comparing Source (111 rows) to Target (Scheduled 2026-07-21 11:41 UTC) (105 rows), matched by Project Number: about 37.8% of rows changed in some way — a lot of change.
2 new records showed up, 1 record went missing, 28 existing records had something change.
Some Project Number values show up more than once: 11 in Source — worth checking these should really be unique.
The changes are spread across a few different columns, most often 'Customer', 'Project Description', 'Project Name'.
'Project Name' also changed several times (7) — mostly cleared out.
'Project Description' also changed several times (6) — mostly cleared out.
The busiest day was 2027-01-01, with more changes than any other day — see the chart below.
Some rows didn't have a usable date, so they're grouped under 'Undated'.
